DAX_Formula:
VAR YoY_Value = [total_net_sales_YoY_Pct]
VAR HistoryExist = NOT ISBLANK([total_net_sales_PY])
VAR Threshold = 0.0005 

VAR Arrow = 
    SWITCH( TRUE(),
        YoY_Value >= Threshold, UNICHAR(9650) & " ",
        YoY_Value <= -Threshold, UNICHAR(9660) & " ",
        UNICHAR(11834) & " "
    )

RETURN
IF(
    HistoryExist, 
    Arrow & FORMAT(YoY_Value, "0.0%;0.0%;0.0%"),
    BLANK()
)
